name: shree-ram-backend
description: Express.js backend for Shree Ram Associate

scripts.db:sync: node -e "const sequelize=require('./config/database'); const { repairCustomerSchema } = require('./migrations/repair-customer-schema'); (async()=>{ await repairCustomerSchema(); await sequelize.sync({ alter: true }); console.log('DB synced successfully'); })().catch(err=>{console.error(err); process.exit(1);});"
